S3_ENDPOINT.description: Your S3-compatible API endpoint. R2: `https://<account>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com`. Backblaze B2: `https://s3.<region>.backblazeb2.com`. Wasabi: `https://s3.wasabisys.com`.

BUCKET.description: The bucket name ClearSight media is written to (under the `clearsight/` prefix).

S3_REGION.description: Signing region. Use `auto` for Cloudflare R2; for B2/Wasabi/S3 use the bucket's region.

S3_ACCESS_KEY.description: Access key ID of a bucket token scoped to **Object Read & Write**. Stored only in this Worker.

S3_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret access key for the bucket token. Stored only in this Worker — ClearSight never sees it.

CS_SHARED_SECRET.description: The HMAC secret ClearSight shows **once** when you save the signer configuration. Paste it here so the Worker can authenticate ClearSight's signing requests.
